title: Bachelor of Science (Hons with Research) in Green Hydrogen
content: Bachelor of Science (Hons with Research) in Green Hydrogen Department of Chemistry & Sustainability Programme Level Under Graduate Duration 4 Years About the Programme Eligibility Fee Structure Program Structure About the Programme Eligibility 10+2 with Science with minimum aggregate of 50% marks.
